schema.from: string - sender display name and address
schema.to: string - recipient display name and address
schema.date: string - ISO 8601 date displayed in message
schema.subject: string - email subject line
schema.body: string - email body text (supports basic HTML)
schema.deliver_at: string - ISO 8601 timestamp for time-gated visibility
schema.in_reply_to: string|null - parent message ID for threading
